---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for RE2
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem or need this feature would address.
Example: "As a compliance officer, I need to ... so that ..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Affected Components

Which part(s) of RE2 would this feature touch?

- [ ] ComplianceCore (domain logic)
- [ ] ComplianceApi (Web API)
- [ ] ComplianceWeb (Web UI)
- [ ] ComplianceFunctions (Azure Functions)
- [ ] ComplianceCli (CLI tool)
- [ ] DataAccess (data layer)
- [ ] Infrastructure (Bicep / pipelines)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
